ddls:
CREATE TABLE "snowboards" (
  "snowboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each snowboard model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the snowboard model */,
  "size_cm" REAL /* Length of the snowboard in centimeters */,
  "waist_mm" INTEGER /* Waist width of the snowboard in millimeters */,
  "sidecut_m" REAL /* Sidecut radius of the snowboard in meters */,
  "effective_edge_mm" INTEGER /* Effective edge length of the snowboard in millimeters */,
  "taper_mm" INTEGER /* Taper of the snowboard in millimeters */,
  "ref_stance_mm" INTEGER /* Reference stance of the snowboard in millimeters */,
  "nose_width_mm" INTEGER /* Nose width of the snowboard in millimeters */,
  "setback_mm" INTEGER /* Setback of the snowboard in millimeters */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the snowboard */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the snowboard */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the construction of the snowboard */,
  "binding_compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility with different types of bindings */,
  "flexibility" TEXT /* Flex rating of the snowboard */,
  "weight_g" INTEGER /* Weight of the snowboard in grams */,
  "profile" TEXT /* Profile of the snowboard */,
  "color" TEXT /* Primary color of the snowboard */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the snowboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snowboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snowboards_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snowboards_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the brand's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "snowboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the snowboard model */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the snowboard is stored */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Stock level of the snowboard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "cost_price" TEXT /* Cost price of the snowboard */,
  "retail_price" TEXT /* Retail price of the snowboard */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date of the last physical stock check */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_snowboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("snowboard_id") REFERENCES snowboards ("snowboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the warehouse */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the warehouse manager */,
  "manager_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the warehouse manager */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse in terms of snowboards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "snowboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the snowboard model ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of snowboards ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_snowboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("snowboard_id") REFERENCES snowboards ("snowboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer first made a purchase */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object storing customer preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
